      public static String formatZeroes(double number, int positions)

    • repeatCharacter

      public static String repeatCharacter(char character, int count)
      Creates a string with a repetition of the same character

      character - character to be repeated
      count - number of times of the repetition
      Returns:
      a string with a repetition of the same character

    • formatSpaces

      public static String formatSpaces(String line, int positions)
      Formats a line with a fixed number of spaces. If the line is longer than positions it is truncked at position length.
      Parameters:
      line - line to be formatted
      positions - number of positions
      Returns:
      the formatted line
